message:
fix(extensions_js): track originating extension ID in pending hostcalls

Store __pi_current_extension_id as extensionId on pending hostcall
entries for both __pi_make_hostcall() and __pi_make_streaming_hostcall()
— enables the Rust dispatcher to attribute async hostcall responses
to the correct extension when multiple extensions have concurrent
in-flight calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
